title: Jeff Rollason
text: Home * People * Jeff Rollason Jeff Rollason [1] Jeff Rollason , a British computer scientist and games programmer, author of the chess program Treebeard [2] , the earlier chess programs Merlin and Rasputin , and the Shogi program Shotest . Jeff is CEO and Founder of the AI Factory [3] . Treebeard and Shotest are AI Factory products.
